title: Side-by-side diagram history preview with revert and back functionality
purpose: Displays current and historical diagram versions side-by-side with controls to revert to a historical version or return to the previous view.
module_context: Exports a React functional component named DiagramHistoryPreview that accepts props for current and historical content, timestamp, and callback functions for revert and close actions. Includes a helper function formatTimestamp for displaying human-readable dates.

steps.content: Convert the ISO timestamp string into a Date object.
Format the date into a human-readable string with short month, numeric day, and 2-digit hour and minute.
Render a header section with timestamp information and action buttons.
Display the historical version content in a left panel with a header showing the timestamp.
Display the current version content in a right panel with a header labeled 'Current'.
Include a 'Revert to this version' button that triggers the onRevert callback.
Include a 'Back' button that triggers the onClose callback.
